mapper.insert: insert into doc(docid, docname, doctype, docroomid, status, time) values (#{docid}, #{docname}, #{doctype}, #{docroomid}, #{status}, #{time})
mapper.select: select docname, doctype, status, time from doc where docname=#{docname} and doctype=#{doctype}
select docname, doctype, doctype, status from doc where status != -1 and docroomid = #{roomid}
